name: World-Famous Philadelphia Vanilla
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine 3 cups cream, sugar, vanilla beans and salt.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, for 10 minutes. Remove bean pods, scraping pulp and seeds into the cream.
3. Cool.
4. Add remaining 3 cups cream to the cooled mixture. Mix well.
5. Churn-freeze.
